overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a female character walking through an industrial urban area on a sunny day. The character moves from an open yard between warehouse buildings into a narrow alleyway, with distant city buildings visible ahead.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through an open industrial yard toward a narrow passage between buildings

entered.detail: large industrial building with corrugated metal siding and roll-up garage doors
modern beige concrete building with large dark windows and geometric architecture
tall multi-story apartment building visible in the background
patches of dry brown grass growing on the dirt ground

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open industrial yard on a sunny day, with a corrugated metal warehouse on the left and a concrete office building on the right. The ground is dirt with sparse dry grass patches, and a tall residential tower is visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley between industrial buildings

events.description: character enters narrow alley between corrugated warehouse and concrete building

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow alley between two industrial buildings toward distant city structures

entered.detail: salmon-colored multi-story apartment building visible at the end of the alley
dark paved asphalt surface of the narrow alleyway

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow enclosed alley between the corrugated warehouse and concrete building. The ground changes to dark asphalt, and a pink apartment building becomes visible at the far end of the passage. The buildings now flank the camera closely on both sides as the character continues walking forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open industrial yard into a narrow, enclosed urban alleyway. It begins with the character walking through a sunny expanse of dirt and dry grass, flanked by a corrugated metal warehouse and a concrete office building with a distant residential tower on the horizon. As the character moves forward, the open space tightens and the terrain shifts from dusty ground to dark asphalt. The scene then closes in as the warehouse and office building flank the camera closely on both sides, transforming the environment into a confined passage. Finally, the perspective extends toward the far end of the alley, where a pink apartment building comes into view.
